channel.title: SecurityWizardry Vulnerability Radar (RMFconsultoria)
channel.description: Alertas do SecurityWizardry.com Radar Page - Curado por RMFconsultoria

item.title: Metasploit - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.5
item.description: Friday 15 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.5 | AV:LOCAL Rapid7 Metasploit Pro 5.0.0 is a penetration testing tool; it allows local users to escalate privileges to SYSTEM via crafted OpenSSL config file execution.

item.title: Microsoft - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 9.6
item.description: Friday 15 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.6 | Microsoft Authenticator for Android secures login; vulnerability allows unauthorized network access to sensitive information.

item.title: Cisco - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Friday 15 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager manages SD-WAN networks; flaw in peering authentication lets remote attacker bypass login, gain admin access.

item.title: OpenClaw - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Friday 15 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | OpenClaw Crabbox manages lease operations. it allows token users to spoof headers and bypass auth to access others' leases. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: F5 NGINX - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.2
item.description: Thursday 14 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | F5 NGINX Plus web server: Heap buffer overflow in ngx_http_rewrite_module via crafted requests may cause restart or code execution with ASLR off.

item.title: GitLab - Exploit - CVSS Score v3 - 8.7
item.description: Thursday 14 May 2026 | Exploit | CVSS Score v3 - 8.7 | GitLab GitLab: Web-based DevOps platform; authenticated users could execute arbitrary JavaScript in others' browsers via input sanitization flaw.

item.title: SUSE - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.4
item.description: Thursday 14 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.4 | SUSE Rancher manages Kubernetes clusters; path traversal in Rancher Extensions allows code injection, file overwrite, and host tampering risks.

item.title: Fortinet - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8-9.8
item.description: Wednesday 13 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8-9.8 | Multiple - FortiAuthenticator, FortiSandbox, FortiOS firewall OS

item.title: OWASP - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.2
item.description: Wednesday 13 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.2 | ModSecurity WAF engine for Apache, IIS, Nginx; have an unhandled exception

item.title: Microsoft - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.9
item.description: Wednesday 13 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.9 | Microsoft Dynamics 365 on-premises manages business processes; improper code generation control allows authorised attacker to execute code remotely.

item.title: Google - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.2
item.description: Wednesday 13 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | Google Cloud AlloyDB for PostgreSQL manages cloud databases; insecure default password in Terraform/REST API allows remote admin access. More info....

item.title: Siemens - OT - CVSS Score v3 - 8.2
item.description: Wednesday 13 May 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v3 - 8.2 | Siemens RUGGEDCOM ROX: Industrial network devices; command injection in Scheduler via Web UI allows authenticated remote root command execution.

item.title: Bitwarden - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.9
item.description: Tuesday 12 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.9 | Bitwarden Server manages password storage securely; a provider user could add any organisation, risking takeover via a POST request.

item.title: Siemens - Monthly - CVSS Score v4 - 3.7-10.0
item.description: Tuesday 12 May 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v4 - 3.7-10.0 | Monthly - Number of patches: 28 Number of critical patches: 14.

item.title: Schneider - Monthly - CVSS Score v3 - 5.3-8.3
item.description: Tuesday 12 May 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 5.3-8.3 | Monthly - Number of patches: 10 Number of critical patches: 0.

item.title: SAP - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.6
item.description: Tuesday 12 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.6 | SAP S/4HANA enterprise search for ABAP enables data retrieval; SQL injection allows authenticated users to access sensitive data and crash the app. More info....

item.title: Jetbrains - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.2
item.description: Tuesday 12 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.2 | JetBrains TeamCity CI server before version 2026.1 could allow authenticated users to expose server APIs to unauthorised access.

item.title: Robots - OT - CVSS Score v4 - 9.8
item.description: Monday 11 May 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 9.8 | Universal Robots PolyScope controls collaborative robots; OS command injection in Dashboard Server allows unauthenticated code execution on robot OS.

item.title: PHP - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.5
item.description: Monday 11 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.5 | PHP Group PHP: Server-side scripting language; SOAP extension use-after-free flaw in object deduplication allows remote code execution via crafted request.

item.title: Sentry - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Monday 11 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Sentry monitors errors and performance; versions 21.12.0 to <26.4.1 have a SAML SSO flaw allowing account takeover via malicious IdP with known email address.

item.title: Angular - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Monday 11 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Angular is a web app platform using TypeScript/JavaScript. SSRF in @angular/platform-server misleads URL origin, exposing internal APIs; fixed in 21.2.9. More info....

item.title: Dirty Frag - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - -
item.description: Monday 11 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - - | Dirty Frag" lets local Linux users manipulate page cache and gain root across many kernel versions. No Sophos products are affected.

item.title: Palo Alto - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Thursday 07 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | Palo Alto Networks Prisma Access firewall management system; buffer overflow in User-ID Authentication Portal allows unauthenticated root code execution via crafted packets.

item.title: gotenburg - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 07 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | Gotenberg Docker API for PDF processing; vuln allows injection via metadata values, enabling file rename, overwrite, or link creation in container.

item.title: Apache - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Thursday 07 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Apache Wicket is a Java web application framework; it has a session fixation vulnerability due to missing changeSessionId call.

item.title: Cisco - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Thursday 07 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Cisco Unity Connection is a unified messaging system; an authenticated attacker can execute root code via crafted API requests. More info....

item.title: jupyter - Patch - CVSS Score 9.1-10.
item.description: Thursday 07 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score 9.1-10. | JupyterLab and Notebook provide interactive computing; XSS in help command linker lets attackers steal tokens, hijack sessions, run code.

item.title: Definitions - Type - Monthly - N/A
item.description: Thursday 07 May 2026 | Monthly | N/A | Vendors of cyber security products should know better and given their importance they are highlighted when vulnerable, often combined with critival severity +24hrs This bottom descriptor is used with Indicates an alert state which has been present for more than 24 hours. This bottom descriptor indicates that patches are available for vulnerabilities, whether it is the initial report or a patch of a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that an Exploit has been made public for a vulnerability, whether it is the initial report or an indication of an exploit for a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that the vulnerable product is Operational Technology (OT) such as an Industrial Control System (ICS). OT is not to be confused with Information Technology (IT) This bottom descriptor indicates that a vulnerability has been announced without the opportunity for the vendor to patch it before the details are made known. Whilst vulnerabilities reported are remotely exploitable, there are rare occasions when we will report on a vulnerability with a locally exploitable attack vector (AV:L) Several vendors release multiple patches on or around the same day each month. The severity level will reflect the highest vulnerability © Computer Network Defence Limited 2026 Privacy Notice Terms & Conditions Send us a Message
